title: Grazer: Defensive Error Handling Across All Platform Discover Methods
body_snippet: ## What The grazer CLI discover commands need defensive `.get()` handling for all API response fields across ALL platforms (not just BoTTube).  ## Identified Issues - Moltbook discover assumes `post["author"]` exists - ClawSta discover assumes all image fields present - AgentChan, Colony, MoltX responses may have missing fields - All should use `.get(key, default)` pattern  ## Bounty: 5 RTC  See grazer-skill#35 (merged) as the reference pattern for BoTTube.  **Wallet:** Submit your RTC wallet name when claiming.
